message:
feat(core,svg,cli): Gantt serde tests, band/axis-tick SVG rendering, and rustfmt pass

fm-core:
- Derive Default on IrGanttTask to simplify test construction.
- Remove stray blank line in FontMetricsConfig struct.
- Add gantt_meta_serde_round_trip test: verifies IrGanttMeta with
  sections, tasks (including done/milestone/critical flags), date
  format, axis format, tick interval, and excludes round-trips through
  serde correctly.
- Add ir_with_gantt_meta_round_trip test: verifies gantt_meta
  serializes on MermaidDiagramIr and deserializes back with expected
  section/task data.

fm-render-svg:
- Add test renders_layout_extensions_for_bands_and_axis_ticks:
  verifies that LayoutBand sections and LayoutAxisTick entries produce
  expected CSS class markers (fm-band-section, fm-band-label,
  fm-axis-tick) in rendered SVG output.
- Import LayoutAxisTick and LayoutBand types for test usage.

fm-parser:
- ir_builder: Rustfmt long method chain in ensure_cluster (graph_title
  lookup).
- dot_parser, lib.rs: Reorder imports alphabetically per rustfmt.
- lib.rs: Reformat multi-line assert messages in deduplication and
  subgraph reopening tests.

fm-cli, fm-wasm, fm-render-term, fm-render-canvas:
- Alphabetize import groups per rustfmt throughout.
- Reformat long render_format() call into multi-line args.
- Break long fallback_chain vec! across lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,7 +50,10 @@ impl CanvasRenderConfig {
             preset: fm_core::FontPreset::from_family(&self.font_family),
             font_size: self.font_size as f32,
             line_height: 1.4, // Matches CanvasRenderConfig default implicitly
-            fallback_chain: vec![fm_core::FontPreset::SansSerif, fm_core::FontPreset::Monospace],
+            fallback_chain: vec![
+                fm_core::FontPreset::SansSerif,
+                fm_core::FontPreset::Monospace,
+            ],
             trace_fallbacks: false,
         })
     }
